title: Tricentrum leptophyllum
taxonomy: Tricentrum leptophyllum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Podostemaceae. It belongs to the genus Tricentrum, which is a part of the Podostemaceae family. The Podostemaceae family consists of aquatic plants commonly known as "rockweed" plants. They are native to tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Asia and Central and South America. Tricentrum leptophyllum, along with other members of the Podostemaceae family, exhibits unique adaptations to survive in nutrient-poor environments.
